docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SMITH, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT ROAD, DERRICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
